meta.description: Startup Validation (R-14, §326-327, §640). Runs on deploy and on schedule. Loads configuration + env vars, validates them (§327), pings providers, and writes a health record. On invalid config/secrets/providers it marks platform health Critical and raises an alert; downstream master workflows refuse to run against invalid configuration. Realizes v1.0 'SHALL stop startup' as 'SHALL block execution and alert when configuration is invalid'.

nodes.name: Scheduled Trigger
nodes.notes: Interval mirrors monitoring.healthCheckInterval (§308). Keep in sync with configuration/monitoring.yaml.

nodes.name: Mark Healthy
nodes.notes: Persist health=Healthy to monitoring.health_checks (§229) — node added when Sprint 2 creates the table.

nodes.name: Mark Critical + Alert
nodes.notes: Persist health=Critical to monitoring.health_checks and raise alert via UT-004 Notifications (Sprint 8). Downstream master workflows check this record and refuse to run (R-14).
